ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k

Interface IDayMode


  • public interface IDayMode
    Day mode brightness functions (CSD/PSD/RSD), \nIf you want to change the theme of the application, try to use UiModeManager \nand application resource with -night or -notnight

      Nested Classes

      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int BRIGHTNESS_AUTO_ADJUST
      Central control brightness auto-adjustment switch, original ID: SETTING_FUNC_BRIGHTNESS_AUTO_ADJUST 中控亮度自动调节开关，原 ID 为 SETTING_FUNC_BRIGHTNESS_AUTO_ADJUST ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 14:28:59
